heading: Omitted
label: 397 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, acts , title II, § 204(e), ; , , authorized transfer of Commodity Credit Corporation funds not to exceed $17,000,000 for fiscal year ending and not to exceed $20,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1957 and 1958 for brucellosis eradication, indemnification for destroyed cattle and administrative expenses and authorized appropriations to reimburse the Commodity Credit Corporation for the expenditures.Aug. 28, 1954, ch. 104168 Stat. 900Apr. 2, 1956, ch. 159, § 270 Stat. 87June 30, 1956
